flags.message: The required 2026-07-13 snapshot contains a May 18, 2026 entry stating that judgment was vacated and remanded in light of Louisiana v. Callais, plus a June 22 judgment entry, while context.json labels the cell forward and event.yaml says resolved: false. I did not use the disclosed disposition or dissent in forecasting, but the same entry revealed the legal question; evaluators should treat this cell as outcome-contaminated.
